retrieved_result: The Start-to-Finish Guide To Using Concrete By Merle Henkenius Sep 30, 2009Nearly 2000 years ago, the Romans constructed a temple of a size and design that engineers still look upon with awe. It was a massive circular building, 143 ft. in diameter, covered by a monolithic dome. The building still stands. It's called the Pantheon--and it's mad
